cmd:
sed -i '/\/\*\*\n \* Increment the shared counter by 1.\n \*\/\nasync function incrementCounter() {/,/^}$/c\\
/**\\
 * Increment the shared counter by 1.\\
 *\\
 * Uses the atomic INCR command to increment the counter.\\
 */\\
async function incrementCounter() {\\
  const client = createClient();\\
  const newValue = await client.incr(COUNTER_KEY);\\
  logger.debug(\`Counter incremented to \${newValue}\`);\\
  return newValue;\\
}' /app/app/counter.js
